title: Cordless Vacuum Cleaner, 600W 50KPA 65Mins Cordless Stick Vacuum with Touch Screen AUTO-Mode, Pet Tool &1M Hose, Wall-Charging, Fragrance Release, Powerful Vacuum for Floors/Carpets/Pet Hair UK Homes
features: 🌀【Upgraded 50Kpa & 600W Powerful Suction】This 600W ultra-lightweight cordless vacuum cleaner delivers 50Kpa of powerful suction power, removing up to 99% of embedded pet hair from sofas, chairs, stairs, car interiors, and more, up to 2x faster. The touchscreen displays four customizable suction modes, allowing you to easily adjust suction power. It also provides runtime reminders, filter maintenance, and blockage notifications to ensure a thorough and efficient clean.

🔋【65-Minute Battery Life, 4-Hour Charge】The vacuum cleaner's battery capacity has been significantly upgraded! This upright vacuum features 8x2500mAh high-capacity batteries, extending the cleaning time by 35% compared to traditional stick vacuum cleaners. With a single charge, it can run continuously for up to 65 minutes in ECO mode(standard mode: 40 mins, boost mode: 23 mins). Additionally, we provide a storage charging dock that fully charges the battery in just 4 hours, with the optional backup battery, the battery life doubles to 130 mins!

🥇【Accessory cleaning kit】Fieety vacuum cordless comes with a comprehensive 13-in-1 cleaning kit, and the 1m extendable hose brings you unparalleled cleaning versatility. You can easily convert it into a convenient handheld vacuum cleaner, and the soft hose is used with the pet brush/2-in-1 flat vacuum tool/precision crevice brush to ensure that every corner of your home (from door frames to sofa gaps,window sills and your car) is spotless. Designed for power and convenience, this vacuum cleaner cordless redefines home cleaning efficiency.

⚡【Auto Mode & Anti-Tangle】The Ultra 10 cordless stick vacuum cleaner features a new motorized floor head designed to minimize hair entanglement. It features four bright LED lights and 270° rotation, making it easy to clean every corner of your home! Auto mode intelligently detects carpeted and hard floor areas and adjusts suction power accordingly, is a good carpet vacuum cleaner!

🔄【Fresh and Aromatherapy Cleaning Experience】This lightweight stick vacuum utilizes an eight-stage filtration system: cyclonic, sponge, HEPA, air duct, reinforced metal filter, air outlet, air guide vanes, and fragrance sheet. This effectively traps harmful substances such as dust, pollen, and bacteria, One-click cleaning of pet hair will make your house say goodbye to flying hair, delivering clean air and protecting your family's health.

🐶【Powerful Pet-Friendly Cleaning】Tired of stubborn pet hair everywhere? Our pet cordless vacuum cleaners for pet hair's specialized detangling brush easily removes embedded hair and dander. Regular use not only prevents matting and reduces shedding, but also stimulates healthy coat growth. Enjoy a cleaner home and a happier, well-groomed pet!

📞【Exceptionl After-Sales Support】If you experience any issues with your wireless vacuum cleaner, our dedicated team is here to help. Simply reach out to us at any time, Need replacement parts but unsure where to find them? Drop us a message, At Fieety, we’re committed to delivering top-quality products and outstanding customer service– we’re always ready to help!
